Bus Timings

E411 Bus Route Timings Ajman Al Musallah to Etisalat Station

August 13, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The service is designed to simplify travel between these two major areas, offering multiple departures throughout the day for maximum convenience.

Operational Details

Bus E411 operates with regular departures throughout the day, giving passengers flexibility depending on their schedule. The service runs every day, making it a reliable option for both daily commuters and occasional travelers. Here are the detailed timings for Bus E411:

From Ajman — Al Musallah Bus Station From Etisalat Bus Station
06:00 06:37
07:00 07:37
08:00 08:37
09:00 09:37
10:00 10:37
11:10 11:47
12:10 12:47
13:10 13:47
14:15 14:52
15:15 15:52
16:15 16:52
17:15 17:52
18:25 19:02
19:40 20:17
20:36 21:13
21:25 22:02

Bus E411 Timetable

For detailed timings, you can refer to the official RTA website or follow this link for E411 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing

The fare for Bus E411 from Dubai to Ajman is AED 12 when using a Nol card, making it an affordable option for commuters. Departing from Etisalat Bus Station in Dubai and arriving at Al Musallah Bus Station in Ajman, passengers can enjoy a seamless, cashless travel experience with the convenience of the Nol card system.

Route Overview

The route caters to passengers looking for a smooth and uninterrupted journey between Ajman and Dubai. Key stops along the route include:

  1. Ajman — Al Musallah Bus Station The starting point, connecting passengers to local services in Ajman.

  2. Al Ittihad / LuLu Hypermarket A central stop for shoppers and commuters.

  3. Al Rashidiya Tower / Rashidiya Serving nearby residential communities.

  4. Crown Palace Hotel A stop for hotel guests and visitors in Ajman.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Thumbay Hospital A crucial stop for those needing access to healthcare services.

  2. Etisalat Bus Station The final destination, providing connections to Dubai’s metro and other bus routes.

Other RTA Dubai bus routes you might want to check out include the F23, which travels between Stadium Bus Station and Al Nahda 1, along with the C10, which passes through Hassa Bint Al Murr Masjid and Hamriya Port.

Nearby Attractions

Bus E411 provides convenient access to several important destinations and landmarks along the route, making it a useful service for both locals and visitors. Key attractions include:

  • Al Ittihad/LuLu Hypermarket

  • Thumbay Hospital
  • Etisalat Bus Station

Journey Experience

Taking Bus E411 from Etisalat Bus Station in Dubai to Al Musallah Bus Station in Ajman offers a smooth and comfortable journey. The bus is equipped with air-conditioned seating and features designed for people of determination (PoD), ensuring an inclusive travel experience.

The direct route allows you to enjoy the ride without the hassle of multiple transfers.

Bus E411 is a vital transportation service connecting Ajman and Dubai, providing reliable, affordable travel with well-timed departures. Whether you are commuting for work, shopping, or leisure, the E411 route offers a convenient solution for inter-city travel. For more details on schedules and services, be sure to check the official resources of Ajman and Dubai’s public transportation systems.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 13, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
